Use --agent <id> to target a configured agent directly. Related: Agent send tool: Agent send ​ Examples Copy openclaw agent --to +15555550123 --message "status update" --deliver openclaw agent --agent ops --message "Summarize logs" openclaw agent --session-id 1234 --message "Summarize inbox" --thinking medium openclaw agent --agent ops --message "Generate report" --deliver --reply-channel slack --reply-to "#reports" acp agents ⌘ I Powered by
